evidence_gaps: No direct access to analytics from 'Most Popular Pages DAB - Copy.xlsx'
Limited visibility into actual user journeys and success rates
No search log or support ticket data to validate frequency assumptions

task_longlist.task_statement: File an appeal for an HHS decision

evidence.note: Primary call-to-action directs users to e-filing system

task_longlist.rationale: Core purpose of site; clearly emphasized and supported by dedicated system

task_longlist.task_statement: Determine if my case can be appealed

evidence.note: Helps users assess whether they should appeal

task_longlist.rationale: Critical prerequisite to filing appeal; somewhat complex to interpret

task_longlist.task_statement: Find which DAB division handles my case

evidence.note: Explains routing to Board, ALJ, or Council

task_longlist.rationale: Essential for correct filing; errors could delay appeals

task_longlist.task_statement: Search prior DAB or ALJ decisions
task_longlist.rationale: Key research task for legal and compliance users

task_longlist.task_statement: Access instructions for filing an appeal
task_longlist.rationale: Critical support task enabling successful appeal submission

task_longlist.task_statement: Contact DAB for help with my case
task_longlist.rationale: Important fallback task; navigation may be complex due to many contacts

task_longlist.task_statement: Learn about alternative dispute resolution options
task_longlist.rationale: Relevant but less central than filing appeals
Orientation task; less critical than transactional tasks

task_longlist.task_statement: Find deadlines and requirements for appeals
task_longlist.rationale: High-risk task; missing deadlines has severe consequences

task_longlist.task_statement: Explore DAB careers or job opportunities
task_longlist.rationale: Not core to primary audience intent

task_longlist.task_statement: Read news or updates about DAB

recommended_survey.instructions: Select the 5 most important tasks you came to this site to complete. Then select the 3 least important.
task_list_for_voting: File an appeal for an HHS decision
Determine if my case can be appealed
Find which DAB division handles my case
Search prior DAB or ALJ decisions
Access instructions for filing an appeal
Find deadlines and requirements for appeals
Contact DAB for help with my case
Learn about alternative dispute resolution options
Explore DAB careers or job opportunities
Read news or updates about DAB
target_segments: Individuals filing appeals (Medicare, CMS, FDA cases)

next_steps: Validate top tasks via survey with real users
Analyze search logs and top pages for behavioral confirmation
Audit findability of deadlines and eligibility guidance
Simplify decision pathways for appeal type and division selection
Test usability of e-filing entry points
summary: Top tasks center on filing appeals, determining eligibility, identifying the correct division, and accessing instructions and deadlines. These are high-frequency, high-impact actions directly tied to the DAB’s core function. Key risks include unclear eligibility guidance, complex routing between divisions, and difficulty finding deadlines—all of which could lead to failed or delayed appeals. Secondary tasks like contact and ADR support play a supporting role, while careers and news are low-priority. Next validation should confirm whether users struggle most with determining appeal eligibility and navigating to the correct filing path.
